dict.string: Intelligence-grade domain security analysis. RFC-compliant DNS auditing with ICD 203 confidence scoring. Provides detailed and covert security badges, downloadable snapshots with integrity hashes, topology visualizations, and Internet Archive permanent records.

DNS Security Intelligence — RFC-grounded domain analysis with Bayesian confidence scoring. Returns enriched reports with security badges, observed-records snapshots (SHA-3-512), DNS topology maps, Wayback Machine archives, and Zotero-compatible citation metadata. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18854899
